name: @foil/bot
description: Foil HQ Discord ops bot — @mention chat with persistent memory and Foil-grounded system prompt. See docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-013.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test src/__tests__/db.test.ts src/__tests__/system-prompt.test.ts src/__tests__/mention.test.ts src/__tests__/tools.test.ts src/__tests__/reset-command.test.ts src/__tests__/embed.test.ts src/__tests__/beehiiv-tools.test.ts src/__tests__/message-splitter.test.ts src/__tests__/approve-command.test.ts src/__tests__/engagement-buttons.test.ts
